rule_seed: R51a1 TerminalUnitReturnAdmitted boundary fixture; product checker NOT_RUN.

rule_seed: R51a1 design fixture; product checker NOT_RUN.

admitted_condition: minimum closed boundary of the declared decision procedure
rule_seed: R51a1 TrailingClosureSuffixAdmitted boundary fixture; product checker NOT_RUN.

violated_condition: the preceding ordinary call has no closure parameter for the trailing suffix
rule_seed: R51a1 design fixture; product checker NOT_RUN.

an ordinary trailing-closure suffix is admitted only when the preceding call has an exact closure parameter; without such a parameter the suffix emits TRAILING_CLOSURE_REQUIRES_FUNCTION_PARAMETER; a message-owned closure is not an ordinary trailing suffix and remains owned by the message parse rather than being rejected by this predicate

admitted_condition: the brace remains owned by the message parse and is not reinterpreted as an ordinary trailing suffix
